title: Solenomelus segethi
intro: There is not enough information on Solenomelus segethi.
taxonomy: Solenomelus segethi is classified as a species of fungus within the genus Solenomelus, which belongs to the family Ustilaginaceae. The Ustilaginaceae family is a group of smut fungi that are typically parasitic on plants. Solenomelus segethi is a type of parasitic fungus that infects the seeds of its host plant. The exact classification of Solenomelus segethi is within the phylum Ascomycota and kingdom Fungi. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships between different species of fungi.
